mapper.sql: id, user_id, username, username_hash, hostname, team, created_stime, modified_stime, is_del
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username, hostname, DATE(created_stime) AS registerDate FROM metrics_users WHERE DATE(created_stime) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY created_stime DESC

SELECT s.project_name AS projectName, u.username AS userName, COUNT(*) AS sessionCount FROM metrics_sessions s LEFT JOIN metrics_users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_del = 0 WHERE DATE(s.started_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND s.is_del = 0 GROUP BY s.project_name, u.username ORDER BY sessionCount DESC
